# False positive samples — these must NOT trigger secret detection

# Normal base64 strings
dGhpcyBpcyBhIHRlc3Q=
aW1hZ2UgZGF0YQ==

# Empty or short values
password = ""
api_key = "short"
secret = ""

# Code comments mentioning patterns
# This regex matches AKIA followed by 16 chars
# The Slack token format is xoxb-NUMBER-STRING

# Variable names (not values)
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=
